backendEntitlementBehavior: Verified Stripe webhook grants the shared subscription entitlement for the user.
uiNeeded: Normal web checkout and Stripe portal are acceptable on web.
notes: Web Stripe is the strongest current purchase path.

allowed: Yes for existing paid account access
policyRisk: Medium if Android exposes Stripe checkout or portal
backendEntitlementBehavior: Same subscription row grants Android access after Stripe webhook updates entitlement.
uiNeeded: Android should allow login/access only and should not link to Stripe checkout or portal for digital subscription changes.
notes: Current mobile manage flow can open Stripe portal for Stripe-managed users.

allowed: Yes for existing paid account access
policyRisk: Medium to high if iOS exposes Stripe checkout or portal
backendEntitlementBehavior: Same subscription row grants iOS access after Stripe webhook updates entitlement.
uiNeeded: iOS should allow login/access only and should not link to Stripe checkout or portal for digital subscription changes.
notes: Apple permits access to multiplatform subscriptions acquired elsewhere when the app does not steer to external purchase.

allowed: Yes and required for new Android digital purchases
policyRisk: High until Play Billing purchase flow and store config are fixed
backendEntitlementBehavior: Verified Google Play purchase applies Play Store provider state to the shared subscription row.
uiNeeded: Use native Play purchase, restore, and Play subscription management links.
notes: Android subscription request currently lacks subscription offer token/base plan offer data.

technicallySupported: Partial; depends on successful mobile verification
backendEntitlementBehavior: Shared entitlement should unlock web after backend Play verification.
uiNeeded: Web should show subscription as Play-managed and avoid duplicate Stripe subscription prompts.
notes: Unified entitlement source conflicts must be fixed before scale.

technicallySupported: Partial; depends on successful mobile verification
backendEntitlementBehavior: Shared entitlement should unlock iOS after backend Play verification.
uiNeeded: iOS should explain billing source and use App Store IAP for new purchases on iOS.
notes: Do not provide Play billing management as an iOS purchase path.

allowed: Yes and required for new iOS digital purchases
policyRisk: High until App Store config and source conflicts are fixed
backendEntitlementBehavior: Verified Apple transaction applies App Store provider state to the shared subscription row.
uiNeeded: Use native IAP purchase, restore, and App Store subscription management links.
notes: Store product configuration and sandbox review setup need manual verification.

technicallySupported: Partial; depends on successful mobile verification
backendEntitlementBehavior: Shared entitlement should unlock web after backend Apple verification.
uiNeeded: Web should show subscription as App Store-managed and avoid duplicate Stripe subscription prompts.
notes: Unified entitlement source conflicts must be fixed before scale.

technicallySupported: Partial; depends on successful mobile verification
backendEntitlementBehavior: Shared entitlement should unlock Android after backend Apple verification.
uiNeeded: Android should explain billing source and use Play Billing for new purchases on Android.
notes: Do not provide App Store billing management as an Android purchase path.
